title: rubus rivularis var. scabriramus
intro: Rubus rivularis var. scabriramus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a plant species belonging to the Rubus genus, a group of flowering plants in the rose family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus rivularis var. scabriramus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
